tools.name: read_file
tools.description: Read a UTF-8 file from the active workspace.

tools.name: write_file
tools.description: Write a UTF-8 file after policy checks.

tools.name: list_files
tools.description: List files under a workspace path.

tools.name: run_command
tools.description: Run an allow-listed command in the workspace.

tools.name: cms_recall
tools.description: Search CMS memories for the local session user.

tools.name: cms_recent
tools.description: Return recent CMS memories for the local session user.

tools.name: cms_remember
tools.description: Store non-secret CMS memory for future recall.

tools.name: eternium_prepare_context
tools.description: Prepare an Eternium context packet using CMS recall and budgeting.

tools.name: spawn_subagent
tools.description: Delegate a bounded task to a child agent.
